description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages pre-build and build, set the TZ variable to Europe/Berlin, and configure a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME that includes all untracked files. In the pre-build stage add a .compile_svgs job using the finwood/inkscape Docker image that runs `make svgs` and publishes the files matching img-*.pdf* and svg/*.svg as artifacts that expire after 1 day. Also in pre-build add a .render_templates job using the registry.gitlab.com/finwood/rt2 image that runs `make templates` and stores all untracked files as artifacts for 1 day. In the build stage add a compile job using the finwood/latex image that runs `make pdf` and saves the latex.out/ directory as an artifact that expires after 4 weeks.
